steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The goal explicitly asks the student to “specify the average weight.” To specify means to state exactly. The notes include the exact weight: “It has an average weight of 19 grams.”

steps.title: Find the choice that states this weight
steps.content: Choice D directly provides this: “The large tree finch has an average weight of 19 grams.” The other three fail to specify the weight, instead providing geographic or ecological information about the bird or islands. That matches choice D — D is correct.
